platform: Phenom Applied AI — Intelligent Talent Experience Platform
platform_summary: An enterprise talent intelligence system with AI engines, ontologies, and explainable AI (XAI) that delivers personalized experiences across the entire talent lifecycle: from candidate attraction through employee retention. Serves candidates, employees, recruiters, hiring managers, HR, talent marketers, and HRIT teams.

products.name: Phenom Career Site
products.description: AI-powered career site platform that personalizes the job-discovery experience for every visitor. Surfaces the most relevant jobs and dynamic content based on each candidate's skills, experience, interests, and location — helping them find and choose you faster. Includes a built-in talent community (passive candidate CRM capture), conversational chatbot, CMS for self-service content publishing, video hub for employee testimonials, and intelligent predictive search.
key_features: AI-driven hyper-personalized job recommendations
Talent community for passive candidate capture and nurture
Integrated conversational chatbot (24/7 screening, FAQ, scheduling)
Self-service CMS — publish content in minutes without engineering
Video Hub — employee ambassador testimonials showcasing culture
Digital accessibility compliance
Intelligent predictive search with smart keyword matching
gaps_it_addresses: generic careers site with no personalization
no talent community or CRM capture for passive candidates
low apply-conversion rate
no chatbot or virtual assistant on careers site
poor candidate experience / high bounce rate

products.name: Phenom Talent CRM
products.description: Comprehensive CRM that enables talent acquisition teams to build, engage, and track candidate pipelines. Uses AI fit scoring, dynamic list segmentation, and rediscovery algorithms to surface the best-fit talent from existing pipelines — including silver-medalists, past applicants, and talent community members. Won Best Use of AI in HR by The 2024 A.I. Awards.
key_features: AI Fit Score — ranks candidates by skills, experience, and location match
Dynamic lists — auto-updating candidate segments for targeted campaigns
Rediscovery — re-engages past applicants when better-fit roles open
AI Insights — actionable intelligence to inform recruiter strategy
Pipeline health tracking across all open requisitions
Integration with Campaigns for automated email/SMS nurture
products.customer_proof: SEI: recruiter capacity scaled from 30–40 to 200+ requisitions per recruiter
gaps_it_addresses: no CRM — losing passive candidates after each req closes
no rediscovery of past applicants
manual recruiter outreach with no pipeline visibility
cold talent pipelines requiring sourcing from scratch each cycle

products.name: Phenom Campaigns
products.description: Automated email and multi-channel campaign tool to nurture, engage, and convert candidates at scale. Enables personalized employer brand storytelling and targeted role promotion to dynamic audience segments. Integrates with Talent CRM dynamic lists for precision targeting.
key_features: Automated email nurture sequences
Personalized employer brand and job promotion content
Dynamic audience segments from Talent CRM
Campaign performance analytics
Integration with SMS and 1:1 Messaging
products.customer_proof: 129% increase in internal applicants (major retailer); Brother International: 'delights candidates instead of making them feel like just another number'
gaps_it_addresses: no automated candidate nurture after initial application
manual email outreach at scale
no personalized employer brand content delivery

products.name: Phenom Chatbot
products.description: Conversational AI chatbot that automates candidate sourcing, screening, FAQ, and interview scheduling 24/7 on the careers site and via SMS. Guides job seekers to best-fit roles, answers questions instantly, and advances qualified candidates through the funnel — freeing recruiters from repetitive top-of-funnel work.
key_features: AI-powered job recommendations in conversation
Automated prescreening and qualification
FAQ handling — instant answers about roles, benefits, process
Interview scheduling directly in chat
24/7 availability — never miss a candidate interaction
SMS channel support
products.customer_proof: Part of High-Volume Hiring solution achieving up to 90% efficiency gains
gaps_it_addresses: no chatbot or assistant on careers site
slow or inconsistent candidate response time
high candidate drop-off before applying
recruiters overwhelmed by repetitive top-of-funnel screening

products.name: Phenom SMS & 1:1 Messaging
products.description: Real-time multi-channel messaging (SMS, WhatsApp, and other apps) for direct, personalized recruiter-to-candidate outreach. Enables keyword-triggered pipeline growth campaigns, interview follow-ups, and offer communication at scale.
key_features: SMS and multi-channel messaging (WhatsApp, iMessage)
Keyword campaigns for inbound pipeline growth
Automated follow-up sequences
One-to-one personalized recruiter messaging
Integration with Campaigns and Talent CRM
gaps_it_addresses: poor candidate response rate to email
slow interview scheduling
limited mobile-first candidate engagement

products.name: Phenom Automated Interview Scheduling
products.description: Eliminates manual back-and-forth interview coordination with AI-driven scheduling automation. Integrates with recruiter and hiring manager calendars to automatically offer, book, and confirm interview slots — dramatically reducing time-to-interview.
key_features: Multi-calendar integration (Outlook, Google)
Automated slot-offering and booking confirmation
Panel and multi-stage interview coordination
Integration with Chatbot and SMS for seamless candidate experience
products.customer_proof: Electrolux: 78% time savings in scheduling (combined with SMS)
gaps_it_addresses: manual interview scheduling consuming recruiter time
long time-to-interview causing candidate drop-off
poor candidate experience from slow scheduling

products.name: Phenom X+ Screening
products.description: Asynchronous video interview platform for scalable, structured candidate evaluation. Enables one-way video, audio, and text-based screening to assess talent at scale without scheduling overhead — accelerating evaluation while introducing more consistency and structure.
key_features: One-way video, audio, and text interview formats
Structured question sets for consistency
AI-assisted response analysis
Shareable with hiring managers for collaborative evaluation
gaps_it_addresses: inconsistent screening process across recruiters
high volume of candidates to evaluate with limited recruiter time
scheduling overhead for early-stage screening

products.name: Phenom Interview Intelligence
products.description: Records and analyzes interviews to support better, faster, and more consistent hiring decisions. Provides automatic transcription, candidate response insights, and cross-functional collaboration tools — reducing bias and improving signal quality.
key_features: Automatic interview recording and transcription
Candidate response analysis and insights
Cross-functional collaboration and feedback collection
Integration with ATS workflow
gaps_it_addresses: inconsistent interview evaluation across hiring managers
lack of data on interview quality or candidate experience
poor collaboration between recruiters and hiring managers

products.name: Phenom High-Volume Hiring
products.description: End-to-end AI automation purpose-built for hourly, frontline, and seasonal hiring at scale. Combines career site chatbot, automated screening, one-way interviews, SMS outreach, pre-hire assessments, and hiring manager tools to fill roles up to 90% more efficiently. Addresses the unique challenges of high-turnover, high-volume roles where candidate experience and speed-to-offer are critical.
key_features: Career site chatbot with location-aware job guidance
Automated screening and prescreening workflows
One-way video/audio/text interviews
SMS campaigns for role promotion and follow-up
Pre-hire assessments (quality + quantity balance)
Hiring manager evaluation tools
Automated offer workflows
products.customer_proof: Up to 90% more efficient staffing vs. legacy processes (Phenom benchmark); DHL Group: 40% faster time-to-hire
gaps_it_addresses: slow time-to-fill for hourly and frontline roles
high candidate drop-off in legacy ATS apply flows
recruiter overwhelm from high-volume manual screening
inconsistent candidate experience across locations
legacy ATS (Taleo, iCIMS) not optimized for high-volume hiring

products.name: Phenom Talent Marketplace
products.description: Internal talent marketplace that connects employees with open roles, short-term gigs, learning opportunities, and mentors — all personalized by skills, interests, and career goals. Reduces attrition by making internal career paths visible and accessible. Generates a self-improving data engine: the more employees use it, the better the workforce intelligence becomes.
key_features: AI-personalized internal job recommendations
Career Pathing — visual progression maps to future roles
Internal Gigs — short-term projects for upskilling and reskilling
Mentoring — AI-matched mentor/mentee connections
Learning integration — hyper-relevant on-demand learning suggestions
Employee Resource Groups (ERGs)
Skills gap identification and development planning
products.customer_proof: 129% increase in internal applicants (major retailer); increased employee retention (retail case study)
gaps_it_addresses: high voluntary attrition / employees leaving for external opportunities
no internal mobility program or career path visibility
employees unaware of open internal roles
skills gaps with no structured development pathways
lack of mentoring or ERG infrastructure

products.name: Phenom Career Pathing
products.description: Shows employees exactly where their career can take them within the organization — with AI-powered role recommendations, required skills visualizations, and progression paths aligned to both employee goals and company needs. Enables HR to deploy and manage a scalable job architecture without manual overhead.
key_features: AI-recommended next roles based on skills and goals
Skills gap visualization between current and target roles
Career path branching (multiple paths, not a single ladder)
Skills Intelligence engine for HR to manage role frameworks
Integration with Learning for skills gap closure
gaps_it_addresses: employees leaving because they can't see a future at the company
no structured career path framework
skills gaps not identified until performance reviews

products.name: Phenom Onboarding
products.description: Automated onboarding platform that accelerates new hire productivity with personalized journeys from offer acceptance through productive employment. Eliminates cumbersome paperwork, fragmented IT processes, and manual compliance tasks. Centralizes recruiters, hiring managers, and HR operations onto one platform with AI-powered insights.
key_features: Personalized role-specific onboarding journeys
Intelligent data collection with automated verification
Digital compliance — auto-generates federal/state-specific documents
Background check vendor integration
AI-powered insights with natural language queries
Unified view across recruiter, hiring manager, and HR teams
gaps_it_addresses: slow or inconsistent onboarding experience for new hires
manual compliance document generation
fragmented onboarding across multiple disconnected systems
low new hire engagement and early attrition

products.name: Phenom Talent Analytics
products.description: Real-time analytics platform providing visibility into the entire hiring funnel and candidate journey. Tracks career site visitor behavior, source attribution, campaign performance, pipeline conversion, and time-to-hire — enabling data-driven decisions about where to invest recruiting resources.
key_features: Career site visitor behavior and forecasting
Source attribution — paid and organic channel ROI
Campaign performance (email, SMS, chatbot)
Hiring pipeline dashboards — funnel conversion and time-to-hire by role/department
Pre- and post-apply behavior analysis
Stakeholder reporting
gaps_it_addresses: no visibility into TA funnel conversion or time-to-hire by source
inability to attribute which channels drive quality hires
manual reporting consuming TA team time
no data on career site candidate behavior

products.name: Phenom Employee Relationship Management (ERM)
products.description: Proactively identifies organizational skills gaps and creates personalized development journeys for employees. Gives HR teams the data and tools to build high-performing teams, identify flight risks, and map succession — all from a centralized people data platform.
key_features: Skills gap identification across the organization
Personalized employee development journey creation
Succession Planning — identify high-potential employees and map successors
People Manager dashboards for team performance
Integration with Talent Marketplace and Career Pathing
gaps_it_addresses: no succession planning infrastructure
organizational skills gaps only discovered reactively
flight risk not identified until resignation
HR decisions made without real-time workforce data

products.name: Phenom HRIT Experience (Flow Studio + Integrations)
products.description: No-code automation and integration layer that connects Phenom to the broader HR tech stack. Flow Studio lets HRIT teams build and streamline automations and forms across all HR systems without writing code. Includes pre-built integrations, Forms (no-code form builder), and Service Hub for self-service configuration management.
key_features: Flow Studio — visual no-code automation builder for cross-system workflows
Forms — no-code form creation, deployment, and integration
Pre-built integrations with leading HCM/ATS/HRIS platforms
Service Hub — self-service integration and user management
API-driven connectivity
gaps_it_addresses: fragmented HR tech stack requiring manual data transfer
custom integration development overhead
HRIT teams blocked by engineering dependency for workflow changes

products.name: Phenom X+ (Generative AI Layer)
products.description: Phenom's generative AI layer embedded across the entire platform. Powers intelligent content generation, AI Insights for recruiters, Fit Scores, personalization engine, and X+ Screening. Provides explainable AI (XAI) to give transparency into how recommendations and rankings are made — critical for compliance and bias reduction in hiring.
key_features: Generative AI for job description writing and content creation
Explainable AI (XAI) — shows why a candidate or role was recommended
Fit Score — AI ranking of candidate-to-job match
Personalization engine — hyper-relevant experiences for every user
AI Insights — recruiter intelligence layer with actionable recommendations
Talent Discovery — AI-powered internal and external candidate sourcing
gaps_it_addresses: manual job description writing and content creation
recruiters unable to prioritize best candidates at scale
lack of explainability in AI hiring tools (compliance risk)
inconsistent candidate and employee personalization
